name: Fix Mrs. Ramirez's Flat Tire
description: Help Mrs. Ramirez find the puncture, remove the tire, patch the tube, and inflate it safely.

steps.description: Inspect the tire and tube to find the tiny puncture letting air escape.
Use a tire lever to gently remove the tire and reach the inner tube.
Clean the tube, place the patch, and press until it seals.
Pump the tire back to safe pressure and check that it holds air.

completion_dialogue: There we go. You found the cause, took your time, and gave that tire a real repair.
reward_text: You earned 30 ZuzuBucks, 7 reputation, and the Patch Hero badge.
